### Disclaimer

This is free, source-available software provided "as is" without any warranty of any kind. Use it at your own risk. Changing scooter settings or flashing firmware can damage your device and can void its warranty and road approval (ABE) - it is done entirely at your own responsibility. The authors accept no liability for any damage, data loss or legal consequence arising from the use of this app.

### Privacy

Laufbursche Edition is offline-first: it collects nothing and sends no telemetry to the authors or to Teverun. It talks only to your scooter over Bluetooth and - only on your explicit action - to the OpenStreetMap / BRouter servers for offline map downloads or to the SRT server you configure. Full details: [PRIVACY.md](https://github.com/Laufbursche42/tr-lb-edition/blob/main/PRIVACY.md).

For all details on what the app does and how it works, see the [README](https://github.com/Laufbursche42/tr-lb-edition/blob/main/README.md).
